description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, package, and release (the build stage is defined but unused). In the test stage add a test:api job using the microsoft/dotnet:2.0.0-sdk image that runs `cd api/test && dotnet test`; add a test:app job using node:alpine that runs `cd app && npm ci` then `npm run lint` and `npm run test:unit`; add a test:app:e2e job using cypress/base:10 with a cache at .cache/, a variable CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER set to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cache/Cypress, that runs `cd app && npm ci` then `npm run test:e2e:ci`, and on failure stores the directory app/tests/e2e/videos as an artifact named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME for one week. In the package stage add package:api and package:app jobs using docker:latest with the docker:dind service, each executing `docker login -u $DOCKER_USERNAME -p $DOCKER_PASSWORD`, changing to the respective directory, building an image with `docker build --tag $DOCKER_USERNAME/fore-scorer-<component>:${CI_COMMIT_SHA} .` and pushing it with `docker push $DOCKER_USERNAME/fore-scorer-<component>:${CI_COMMIT_SHA}`, and both run only on the master branch. In the release stage add release:api and release:app jobs also on docker:latest with docker:dind, performing `docker login -u $DOCKER_USERNAME -p $DOCKER_PASSWORD`, pulling the SHA‑tagged image, retagging it to latest with `docker tag $DOCKER_USERNAME/fore-scorer-<component>:${CI_COMMIT_SHA} $DOCKER_USERNAME/fore-scorer-<component>:latest`, and pushing the latest tag, again only on master.
